Article.title: GenePoint
Article.summary: Genomics company engaged in mapping and sequencing of the human genome and developing gene-based drugs

Article.title: Edge Communications
Article.summary: Edge, founded in 1998, is a start-up based in Austin, TX. The company designs and manufactures a device to convert music from one digital format to another. Edge sells its product through retailers and its own website.

Article.title: Grand Hotels & Resorts Ltd
Article.summary: Chain of hotels and resorts across the US, UK, Eastern Europe, Japan, and SE Asia.

Article.title: United Oil & Gas Corp.
Article.summary: World's third largest oil and gas company.

Article.title: University of Arizona
Article.summary: Leading university in AZ offering undergraduate and graduate programs in arts and humanities, pure sciences, engineering, business, and medicine.
